generated_oml:
instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor measuring system internal temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor measuring system internal temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor measuring ambient temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Temperature data transmitted via RabbitMQ protocol from three sensors (two internal, one external)"
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimizationEnabler, SupervisoryControllerEnabler
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric representation of physical system dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations model for thermal dynamics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for sensor data and model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveTemperatureSimulationService, RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in temperature sensors or system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveTemperatureSimulationService
]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing heatbed power and fan speed based on temperature data"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureOptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory control system for monitoring and adjusting system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, TemperatureOptimizationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for thermal simulation using analytical and geometric models"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveTemperatureSimulationService
]

instance PredictiveTemperatureSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation of thermal dynamics using calibrated models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight, ThermalStabilityInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of sensor data for safety deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyDeviationAlert, TemperatureDeviationInsight
]

instance TemperatureOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of heatbed power and fan speed to maintain target temperature"
    DTDFVocab:provides PowerAdjustmentAction, FanSpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted future temperature profile based on current operating conditions"
]

instance ThermalStabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of thermal stability under current conditions"
]

instance SafetyDeviationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert for safety-critical temperature deviations"
]

instance TemperatureDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected deviation of temperature from target setpoint"
]

instance PowerAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of heatbed power to maintain temperature setpoint"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FanSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of fan speed to regulate temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized architecture where calibration algorithms update models using sensor data from the Physical Twin, with the updated models informing monitoring systems for safety and optimization checks; human or algorithmic interventions trigger corrective actions to the Physical Twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms adjust model parameters using sensor data to maintain accuracy, and monitors validate system performance against safety and optimality criteria, triggering corrective actions upon violation detection."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication occurs via RabbitMQ protocol over Wi-Fi and Bluetooth networks using a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B as the communication hub. No details on bandwidth, latency, redundancy mechanisms, or security protocols are provided."
]
